_meta.description: Per-boss mechanic data (q12). Keyed by bossName as it appears in PullReplay.bossName. hasFallMechanic = the fight itself launches or knocks the raid into the air and inflicts Falling damage, so a fall burst CANNOT be read as a called-wipe jump on this boss — collapse detection must disable the jump signal there.
_meta.source: Derek (domain knowledge), confirmed against the 2026-04-18 fixture.

Crown of the Cosmos.note: Every intermission phase knocks the entire raid into the air; the raid takes Falling damage on the way down. Recurs once per intermission — it is the fight, not a wipe-jump.
